use_cases: Displaying travel photography or destination highlights with geographic context
Showcasing portfolio locations or case studies across different cities
Creating engaging hero sections for travel, tourism, or lifestyle websites
Visualizing geographic data points with associated imagery for presentations
Adding interactive globe elements to storytelling or editorial content
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component with polaroid-style markers displaying images at geographic locations. Features smooth rotation controls via drag interaction and displays location captions with varied rotation angles for a casual, photo-album aesthetic. Built with the cobe-globe library for performant WebGL rendering.
